results.title: Merritronix Limited IPO (Merritronix IPO)
results.description: Merritronix Limited is an Electronics Systems Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) company specializing in high-reliability and mission-critical electronic assemblies for defence, aerospace, telecom, and industrial electronics sectors. The company provides end-to-end B2B electronic manufacturing services, including component sourcing, PCB assembly, system integration, testing, box-build assembly, and delivery of finished electronic products, all designed to meet the [...]

results.title: Leaving your SSD in the front panel ruins its speed and lifespan
results.description: If you own an external SSD, you’re already ahead of the curve when it comes to following the 3-2-1 rule for backups. But while using an external SSD is as easy as just plugging it in and drag-and-dropping some files, you might be hindering its performance by plugging it in at the front. Read More
